scripts.build: npm run foundry:build && npm run hardhat:build
scripts.test: npm run foundry:test && npm run hardhat:test
scripts.foundry:upgrade:v2: SCENARIO=v2 forge script script/Upgrade.s.sol --root contracts/foundry-diamond --broadcast --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545
scripts.foundry:upgrade:v3: SCENARIO=v3 forge script script/Upgrade.s.sol --root contracts/foundry-diamond --broadcast --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545
scripts.foundry:upgrade:gov: SCENARIO=gov forge script script/Upgrade.s.sol --root contracts/foundry-diamond --broadcast --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545
scripts.foundry:upgrade:token: SCENARIO=token forge script script/Upgrade.s.sol --root contracts/foundry-diamond --broadcast --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545
